title: lastrea rusbyi
intro: Lastrea rusbyi, also known as Rusby's Lastrea, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae and is native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lastrea rusbyi include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Lastrea rusbyi can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
